title: 30 Years Ago, Robots Learned to Walk Without Falling
title_zh: 30年前，机器人学会走路而不摔倒
abstract: When you hear the term    humanoid robot   , you may think of  C-3PO , the human-cyborg-relations android from    Star Wars     .   C-3PO was designed to assist humans in communicating with robots and alien species. The droid, which first appeared on screen in 1977, joined the characters on their adventures, walking, talking, and interacting with the environment like a human. It was ahead of its t
abstract_zh: 当你听到“人形机器人”这个词时，你可能会想到《星球大战》中的人机关系机器人C-3PO。C-3PO被设计用来协助人类与机器人和外星物种交流。这个机器人于1977年首次出现在屏幕上，与角色们一起冒险，像人类一样行走、说话并与环境互动。它领先于它的时代。
tldr_zh: 回顾30年前机器人学会稳定行走的关键技术突破。
cover_zh: 30年前机器人就学会走路了？比你想的更早！

score_breakdown.label: 关键词命中密集
score_breakdown.hint: 频道关键词命中 1 个（humanoid robot）

judge.reason: 历史回顾，缺乏新算法贡献，对当前研究参考价值低
